---
title: "Lawrence Quizon"
subtitle: "Mixed Signal Accelerators | Efficient AI | Researcher @ UP EEEI"
listing: 
    type: table
    fields: [title, date]
    sort: "date desc"
about:
    id: about-section
    template: solana
    image: image.svg
    links:
      - icon: github
        text: Github
        href: https://github.com/Lawrence-lugs
      - icon: linkedin
        text: LinkedIn
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lawrence-roman-quizon-399172158/
      - text: Google Scholar
        href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8LJ9X_gAAAAJ&hl=en
---

::: {#about-section}

My primary research interest is in the creation of efficient computational systems in software and hardware for the advancement of both engineering (*low power computation on the edge, brain-computer interfaces*) and sciences (*device physics, emergent dynamics*). 

:::


<br>


### Secondary Interests

- Open source hardware 
- Hardware CI/CD Workflows
- Differential Equations, Discrete Optimization
- Efficient AI (LPCV, DCASE)
- Physics (GR, QFT)
- Practical Applications of Abstract Math
- Neuropsychological Theories on Learning

# Recent Pages

Notes below are sometimes attempts on active recall, sometimes just literal pastebins while working on something.
